title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese presents a 6-step skill framework for maximizing Claude productivity: web scraping to discover data, ingest-source for knowledge base capture, improve-system for iterative refinement, ask-the-board for multi-perspective feedback, internal-focus-group for pre-ship testing, and compound engineering for deployment. The workflow is demonstrated by building a personal fitness trainer project.
